Headline: Full Stack developer at LTS Beratung
Summary: Hey! You can take a look at my work at vikepic.com  My name is Víctor and I love technology and creating stuff with it.  I made several videogames and participated in numerous hackathons and game jams during my student life. I love talking about computer stuff and science.  I am also involved in social justice issues, such as women's presence in tech and other issues that i hold very important to me.  I like to work with proactive and open-minded people. I consider myself a very social person: I'm always up for grabbing a coffee and talk with interesting people!
